caption: A man with short hair wearing a white button-down shirt is seen in a video presentation. He is positioned in front of a screen displaying a trading chart and a promotional image for "The Art of Timing The Trade." Text on the screen indicates the event is "Tom O'Brien Timing The Trade All Day Webinar" taking place "Friday, June 10th Live from 9 a.m. - 2 p.m. ET." As the video progresses, the scene transitions from the speaker to several informational slides. One slide lists the "TOM O'BRIEN TIMING THE TRADE ALL DAY SEMINAR JUNE 10TH, 2022" and outlines the session parts and topics covered, such as "Quality Volume" and "Swing Points." The final frames show a full-screen graphic titled "The Art of Timing The Trade," which notes it is "Based on concepts from: The Art of Timing The Trade Your Ultimate Trading Mastery System" and is "Presented by Tom O'Brien June 10th, 2022" with the logo "TFNN.COM EDUCATING INVESTORS."
